nasb.text: Aram was your customer because of the abundance of your goods; they paid for your wares with emeralds, purple, embroidered work, fine linen, coral and rubies.

esv.text: Syria did business with you because of your abundant goods; they exchanged for your wares emeralds, purple, embroidered work, fine linen, coral, and ruby.

cnv.text: 亞蘭人因你的產品很多，就作你的貿易夥伴；他們用綠寶石、紫色布、刺繡、細麻布、珊瑚、紅寶石，來換取你的貨物。

ccb.text: 因为你的货物丰富，亚兰人也成了你的客户，他们用绿宝石、紫布、刺绣、细麻布、珊瑚和红宝石与你交换货物。
